    "Obtain an unobstructed, in-focus photo of the hangers and supports.",

    "Confirm load ratings and spacing per project support standards and MSS SP-58."

  "rationale": "The evidence is insufficient to verify that the hangers and supports are the correct components, properly rated, and correctly installed. Without readable identifying marks and connection details, a pass or fail determination cannot be made.",

    "project support standards",
    "MSS SP-58"
